{{Infobox technique
| name = Sandviper techniques
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper techniques]] are used on prisoner flesh.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper techniques]] produce an acid-green glow.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper techniques]] use caustic [[madra]] to melt wood.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
